reviews.review_description: Hello.  Me and my brother played this game.  We really enjoyed it,  the jump scares did their job well . my brother played it first  then I went in to it . i cautiously went down halls and through doors while my brother just went quicker.  we just wish it was a little longer and more rooms to check.  we will be playing the other ones later.  Thank you very much.  We are not teens but we downloaded all 3 because they seemed interesting and based on real facts.

To the DEVS, you guys are so awesome. Thank You! This is one of the best, if not THE BEST one yet. I loved the hospital,  cathedral was cool but I didn't finish that one bc it was messing up, but this is an absolute THRILLER, SCARY GAME. If ppl skip this they are really missing out. Please continue making games with jump scares bc you guys truly are kick-a**!
Allison's Diary trilogy! Great job devs
Once again fantastic ending, was fab really scary just wish it was longer, hoping you make next one longer and A lot more scares and jumps ���
Good game but too short compared to The Cathedral which is longer and better i think. But Allison's diary trilogy is still a must thank you :-)
Not scary + big fps lag = 1 star
Great fun tho would like new chapter keep it coming
3 out of 3 of this series I'm almost ready to start this and finish the game,, quite scary, lots of jump scares and noises.
Hey how bout adding those same red glowing eyes that was seen in the cathedral?  that'll make this game even more terrifying.
Game is cool, but can’t you save the progress? You have to start from the beginning every time you open the app
Very scary made me jump lol
I purchased The Hospital and all my Occulas apps are up to date but it won't let me play the hospital keeps telling me I need to update the Occulas VR app

developer_response.body: Hi there, thank you for playing our games! As your message asks for, make sure to update your Oculus App (not all of the Oculus apps) to the latest version and restart the game. KR Games

reviews.review_description: It looks good, and is very atmospheric. Movement is a bit slow/sluggish and there's quite a bit of wondering about between the scary bits. Not sure if I'll buy the next part or not...
I don't get this to me it is just a app that you wake around a house what is the point to this you say it is a game please tell me how to play it then please
